codeReview.summary: The UI refresh lands most of the reviewer inbox visuals from the pen design, but it also introduces status and priority filters that can never surface approved/rejected or high-priority tasks from the actual inbox data source.

issues.description: The new status filter exposes `approved` and `rejected` options, but `filteredTasks` only operates on `userStore.pendingReviewTasks`, which by contract contains only `submitted` and `in_review` items for the current reviewer. Those filter options always render an empty list, so the UI advertises states that the inbox can never display.

The priority filter offers a `high` option, but task cards only implement the design-specified badge styling for `urgent`, `medium`, and `low`, and the validation contract for this feature only calls for those three reviewer inbox priorities. This creates a user-visible path with unsupported visual treatment and diverges from the design contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `ui-worker` skill says UI features should perform manual browser verification, but this worker returned partial without any UI check once baseline tests failed, while the feature contract itself still required screenshot-style validation against `review-reviewer.pen`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/ui-worker/SKILL.md` section 5 requires browser verification; handoff `2026-03-16T03-27-03-874Z__m3-reviewer-task-list-ui__524b0fb4-681a-4b7b-8004-a4c2a4967a5c.json` records no interactiveChecks and flags the missing browser validation as undone work.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared library currently documents designer-task user testing surfaces, but not the reviewer inbox surface or its key assertions, even though this milestone depends on validating the reviewer inbox against `review-reviewer.pen` and inbox-specific assertions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/library/user-testing.md` only lists designer task tracking flows; reviewer inbox assertions are instead defined in `validation-contract.md` under `VAL-INBOX-001` to `VAL-INBOX-007`.

summary: Review failed: the feature’s visual refactor is incomplete from a correctness standpoint because it adds unreachable status filters and an unsupported high-priority filter path on the reviewer inbox.
